prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style illustration of a tired high school soccer player drinking directly from an outdoor school water fountain after practice. The scene shows exactly 2 chrome faucets on a rectangular concrete fountain: one upper faucet at mouth height pouring a clear stream of water into his open mouth, and one lower faucet mounted on the front face dripping water. Include exactly 1 dark blue sports water bottle standing on the wet concrete ledge to the left. The boy is bent forward in profile, soaked with sweat and water droplets, with messy wet dark brown hair, flushed cheeks, and an exhausted but refreshed expression. He wears a black short-sleeve athletic soccer uniform with blue and white side stripes, black shorts, and a white towel draped around his neck with small Japanese text reading 青葉高校 サッカー部. Set the location beside a school sports field and club building at golden-hour sunset, with warm orange backlighting, long shadows, distant netting and utility poles, a small wall sign reading 部室, wet splashes on the concrete, sparkling water highlights, shallow depth of field, detailed hand-drawn anime rendering, realistic faucet construction, dramatic rim light, vertical composition, no extra characters.
